data.title: Is Moo Deng Crypto the Best Memecoin To Hold This Year?
data.description:
Moo Deng (MOODENG) has seen rapid growth in May following its addition to Robinhood’s crypto listings for US users. Since 8 May 2025, the memecoin has been on a positive trajectory with the price rising 700% in 6 days: from $0. 0409 to $0. 32
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/is-moo-deng-crypto-the-best-memecoin-to-hold-this-year/

data.title: U.S. Treasury Comments Impact Bond Yields Amid Trade Tensions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. 10-year Treasury yield increased by 6 basis points following remarks by U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant. Besant stated that the 90-day pause proposed on April 2 was based on sincere negotiations, but U.S. President Donald Trump found the EU's proposal lacking in quality, hoping this move would motivate the EU to take action.

The market turned downward after Trump announced a 50% tariff on the EU and a 25% tariff on Apple. Besant, appearing on Fox News, heavily promoted the trade 'agreement,' seemingly unaware that the tariffs were intended to lower U.S. bond yields. Besant's comments counteracted Trump's desired yield decrease. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 index has fallen 200 points from its peak, and the headlines about the 'trade agreement' have not helped reduce bond yields.

data.title: SEC Official Clarifies Staking Activities Outside Securities Law Jurisdiction
data.description:
According to PANews, Hester Peirce, head of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) crypto task force, stated in a speech on May 19 that technical activities involved in direct participation in Proof of Stake (PoS) and Delegated Proof of Stake (DPoS) systems do not fall under the jurisdiction of securities laws. This marks the first time a senior SEC official has made such a declaration regarding staking activities.

Peirce highlighted that the SEC plans to issue further guidance to clarify which activities are not subject to securities laws, including technical services that assist in participating in consensus mechanisms. She acknowledged that the SEC's past enforcement and regulatory approaches have not effectively prevented fraud and have instead caused confusion for compliant operators. This statement is seen as a positive signal for U.S. institutions engaging in staking activities. Figment, a staking service provider, noted that this development is expected to encourage broader adoption of staking services by U.S. institutions.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $343 Million Liquidation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed a total liquidation of $343 million over the past four hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $309 million.

data.title: Global Bitcoin Holdings Projected to Reach 4.269 Million by 2026
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin Magazine reports that asset management firm Bitwise forecasts that by the end of 2026, countries and institutions worldwide will collectively hold 4.269 million bitcoins. The total value of these holdings is expected to reach $426.9 billion.

data.title: Bitwise predicts that countries and institutions will hold 4.269 million Bitcoins by the end of 2026
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Bitcoin Magazine, Bitwise, which manages $12 billion in assets, predicts that by the end of 2026, countries and institutions will hold 4.269 million bitcoins, with a total value of $426.9 billion.

data.title: Reuters: Some U.S. regional and community banks are considering setting up independent stablecoin consortiums
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Some regional and community banks in the United States are considering whether to set up an independent stablecoin consortium. The Wall Street Journal previously reported that companies jointly owned by JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Citigroup, Wells Fargo and other large commercial banks are exploring whether to jointly issue a joint stablecoin. However, for small banks, it is much more difficult to invest in the field of stablecoins than large financial institutions. The establishment of an independent stablecoin consortium may allow such banks to participate in the use of stablecoins. (Reuters)

data.title: U.S. stocks opened sharply lower, with Apple falling 3%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The three major U.S. stock indexes opened lower, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average down 1.1%, the S&P 500 down 1.2%, and the Nasdaq down 1.5%. Technology stocks fell across the board, with Apple (AAPL.O) down 3.3% and Trump threatening to impose tariffs on Apple. Nvidia (NVDA.O) fell 2.2%, Amazon (AMZN.O) fell 2.2%, and Tesla (TSLA.O) fell 1.4%. Ross Stores fell more than 8% and the company withdrew its annual guidance. (Jinshi)

data.title: Aethir launches EigenLayer ATH pre-staking and launches liquid staking token eATH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Aethir announced that it has officially launched its ATH pre-staking activity on EigenLayer. Users can now stake ATH in EigenLayer's ATH vault and obtain the liquid staking token EigenATH (eATH).
The vault has integrated EigenLayer's AVS model. The computing power providers in the Aethir network can borrow ATH to operate the decentralized computing power network, and the resulting service fees will be distributed proportionally to eATH holders. All staked ATHs will be locked for one year to ensure network stability.
The redemption function of eATH is expected to be opened on June 13, 2026, followed by a 30-day unlocking period.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has liquidated nearly 342 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $342 million, of which long orders have been liquidated for $308 million, short orders have been liquidated for $33.2701 million, and BTC has been liquidated for $110 million.

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Benson: Trump believes that the EU's proposal is of low quality and hopes that this will motivate the EU to take action
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant: The 90-day suspension proposed on April 2 was based on sincere negotiations. Trump believes that the EU's proposal is of low quality and hopes that this will motivate the EU to take action. Trump believes that the EU's proposal is not as good as other options. The 50% tariff threat is a response to the speed of the EU's action. (Jinshi)

data.title: JD Stablecoin Advances to Second Phase of Sandbox Testing
data.description:
According to Foresight News, JD CoinChain Technology CEO Liu Peng announced that the JD Stablecoin, a cryptocurrency pegged 1:1 to fiat currencies like the Hong Kong dollar (HKD) or the U.S. dollar (USD), has entered the second phase of sandbox testing. This stablecoin is designed for both retail and institutional use, offering applications for mobile and PC platforms.

The testing scenarios primarily focus on cross-border payments, investment transactions, and retail payments. JD CoinChain is collaborating with leading compliant exchanges to facilitate these operations. In the retail payment sector, the company is integrating and testing with JD's Hong Kong and Macau platforms to enhance payment acceptance and processing.

data.title: Ledn Shifts Focus to Bitcoin Collateral Lending, Ends Ethereum Support
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency lending platform Ledn has announced a strategic shift in its services, ceasing support for Ethereum and interest-bearing accounts to focus exclusively on Bitcoin collateral lending. Starting July 1, the platform will offer only 'custodial Bitcoin lending' services, with client collateral assets fully managed by Ledn or its partner institutions. This change follows the introduction of Ethereum collateral lending services in February 2024, marking the closure of both BTC and ETH 'growth accounts.'

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Discusses 90-Day Pause in Negotiations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent stated that the 90-day pause proposed on April 2 was based on sincere negotiations. U.S. President Donald Trump expressed dissatisfaction with the quality of the European Union's proposal, hoping that this move would encourage the EU to take action.

data.title: HashDit Alerts Users to BNB Chain Scams Involving Honeypot Tokens
data.description:
The Web3 security firm HashDit has issued a warning about a rise in scams on the BNB Chain, highlighting the creation of honeypot tokens by malicious groups. These scams involve the creation of fake tokens and liquidity pools, using large amounts of USDT to simulate high trading volumes. The scammers then promote these tokens in dubious 'pump groups' using flashy charts to attract unsuspecting users.

HashDit advises users to avoid joining random pump or investing groups and to always verify information through official sources such as Binance or CoinMarketCap. Additionally, users are encouraged to utilize the HashDit Token Checker available on their website to ensure the legitimacy of tokens.

The firm emphasizes the importance of staying informed and cautious to avoid falling victim to these scams.

data.title: Kazakhstan to Legalize Cryptocurrency Exchange Services with Licensing
data.description:
According to PANews, Kazakhstan is set to legalize cryptocurrency exchange services through a licensing system, as announced by Yerlan Ashykbekov, head of the National Bank's payment systems department. The new regulations will require trading platforms to establish risk management systems, user interaction rules, and asset protection mechanisms. The central bank will approve a list of cryptocurrencies eligible for trading.

Under the legislative amendments, licensed exchange operators will be able to conduct business under the supervision of the central bank. Currently, only exchanges within the Astana International Financial Centre (AIFC) are permitted to operate legally. The new regulations aim to integrate two regulatory frameworks. Kanysh Tuleushin, Deputy Minister of the country's digital development department, disclosed that existing policies mandate miners to sell 75% of their output through the AIFC platform.

Additionally, the new regulations will create a market for 'secured digital assets,' categorized into three types: fiat-backed stablecoins, digital certificates of financial instrument rights, and tokenized assets of traditional financial instruments such as bonds and stocks. The central bank also plans to introduce a digital asset regulatory sandbox.

data.title: Bitcoin Sees Strongest Accumulation Since January Amid Renewed Market Optimism
data.description:
TL;DR Surge in Accumulation: Bitcoin is in its strongest accumulation phase since January, trading above $110K as renewed bullish sentiment drives aggressive buying. Widespread Demand: Both institutional and retail investors are stacking up Bitcoin, with on-chain data showing a perfect accumulation trend score of 1. 0. Whale & Options Support: Increased whale activity and bullish options
source: https://crypto-economy.com/bitcoin-sees-strongest-accumulation-since-january-amid-renewed-market-optimism/
